mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'FAILED'
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_task SET success_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS'), failed_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'FAILED'), pending_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING'), updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
